claim_bullets.bullet_text: JavaScript allows functions to nest inside each other, and handles variables from 'outside' of a function that are referenced inside a function (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.44-44)
The result of applying a function is a function when the expression body is another function (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.44-44)
A value representing a function is created when a function is applied (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.44-44)

source_record_text: Summary of closures and scope concepts from JavaScript Allongé, covering free variables, closures, and environments.
